a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Share of FrontierMath problems solved correctly by AI models
The FrontierMath benchmark tests AI models on research-level mathematics problems that take expert
mathematicians hours or days to solve.
Share of problems solved correctly by each model
Note: This chart shows performance on Tiers 1-3 of the FrontierMath benchmark (300 problems).
